text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Today's training is red light, green light! We'll make it longer this
time, and start from the school gates—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Um, I have a question.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So far, our training has felt a lot like play, and I'm wondering if that's
going to be enough.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It is really fun! But maybe... should we try some normal training like
weights or something?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What, you're bored and you want more of a challenge? In that case,
let's step it up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Good idea! As the class rep, I must take into account the opinions of
my dear junior!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aite. Gimme a minute.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And so, I have called on Team Centurial to join us!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Great! I brought Team Muscle over.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Then let us begin! Our joint training activity will be tag!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If you're tagged by "it," you become "it," and the "it" who tagged you
is no longer "it." When time's up, whoever's not "it" wins!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Y-you called everyone over to play more games?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so the tag training session begins...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Pheeew! I... I think I finally outran her. I need a little break...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Bright wouldn't let up chasing me the whole time. Even though Doto
was right next to me tying her shoelaces, why me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... I caught up to you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Teehee, tag!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh? No way! And she's already gone!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Opera O, why have you been running beside me for so long? You can
reach me if you just reach out your hand, can't you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I won't fall for that! The moment I reach out to tag you, you'll speed
up!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And I'll admit, part of me is enjoying this little exchange of ours!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: She saw right through me... And what's worse, she's not tiring out at all!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: So I'll have to shake you off here!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You're not getting away!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: So you dodged me, huh. You're tenacious, I'll give you that.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I can't keep running anymore!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I know you've got stamina 'cause you've already made it this far.
What's more, you're pretty observant, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Have you been doing some complex training? I'd love to hear more
about it... later!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And that concludes our joint training! Thank you for joining us, Team
Centurial and Team Muscle!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No, thank you for inviting us! That was fun! I feel like we'll return to
training tomorrow with renewed vigor.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Sticking to just one type of training can be limiting sometimes, so this
was a great chance to broaden our horizons!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...What's wrong, Kita?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe the training we've been doing has been worth it all along.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Like today, Ryan complimented me while we were playing tag! And I
thought, maybe our team training is really working!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I can feel the effects of our practice too. I guess the older
students know what they're doing!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I feel better about it now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So, I've come up with a training program for each of us to help
overcome the issues we identified during joint training!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! I see! So those are the muscles you train to keep running for a long time! This is... so helpful!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's start with the exercises that are on everyone's
programs!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oooooh, that was tough!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whew! Ah, my thighs are shaking! Mm, feels like I got a good
workout!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You're doing great, Bright! Keep it up at your own pace, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Okay! Gulp... pant...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, is her bike set to gradually increase the resistance over time?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Now you mention it, it does look like she's pedaling harder than
before...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I knew she meant business when I saw her decked out in all that
compression clothing, but this...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Don't work yourself too hard, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Sorry I'm taking so long... But... this is only the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Starting from tomorrow, I've planned on making my training sessions
even longer, so I need to make sure I show up every day and
complete my goals properly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I know you can do it, Bright! All right, l'm gonna do one more set too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: They're both amazing! Come on, Tannhauser, let's keep at it too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I think I've still got more in me! I'll add ten more laps to my
daily run...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...But that's still not enough, is it?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Spe and Bright are working so hard. If I don't work even harder than
them, I'll get left behind.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... If only I knew a way to make my training more efficient, like
Bright and her compression wear.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...I know! That super drink I saw on Umatter the other day! It's
apparently even more effective than drinking protein before your
workout!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'll give it a shot! I've got to try whatever I can if it'll help!
